title: Youtube Poop: The Spy's Reluctant Request
description: So listen up, here's the story, about a little spy that lives in the blue world, and all day and all night and every thing he sees is just blue, like him, inside ans outside. Blue, his house and a blue little window and a blue corvette, and everything is blue for him, and hisself and everybody around him, 'cause he ain't got nobody to listen to. I'm blue, da ba dee da ba spy. Da ba dee, da ba spy, da ba dee, da ba spy. Da ba dee, da ba spy.
